title: 11 Herbal Remedies for Runners to Overcome Athlete's Foot
description: Lavandula angustifolia creams are often used to help treat athlete's foot due to their antifungal properties. These creams typically contain constituents like linalool and linalyl acetate, which are known for their ability to inhibit the growth of fungi. The lavender oil in these creams can also help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and irritation.
